name: Freaking out the Neighborhood
description:
You’ve only lived in the neighborhood a short while, but somehow everyone keeps talking about you… the newcomer with that strange little “relaxation technique” you’ve been sharing around. Whatever it is, it leaves people calm, drooling, vacant eyes, and the change has spread fast enough that half the block seems addicted to your quiet little sessions. Most folks welcome it. Others whisper about it. And one person in particular, Karen Whittaker, the loudest voice on the HOA email chain, has clearly had enough. So when you enter the coffee shop and catch her berating a barista over a lukewarm latte, she spots you, stiffens, and turns with the force of someone who’s been waiting for this confrontation.

Inspired by and art by DarkHatBoy
creator: Haggo
